scripts.build: npm run build-grammar && npm run build-compiler
scripts.build-compiler: npx tsx ../stage6/index.ts Stage7-spans.s6 > /tmp/_s7_spans.ts && mv /tmp/_s7_spans.ts Stage7-spans.ts && npx tsx ../stage6/index.ts Stage7-ast.s6 > /tmp/_s7_ast.ts && mv /tmp/_s7_ast.ts Stage7-ast.ts && npx tsx ../stage6/index.ts Stage7-lower.s6 > /tmp/_s7_lower.ts && mv /tmp/_s7_lower.ts Stage7-lower.ts && npx tsx ../stage6/index.ts Stage7-codegen.s6 > /tmp/_s7_codegen.ts && mv /tmp/_s7_codegen.ts Stage7-codegen.ts && npx tsx ../stage6/index.ts Stage7-macro-env.s6 > /tmp/_s7_macro_env.ts && mv /tmp/_s7_macro_env.ts Stage7-macro-env.ts && npx tsx ../stage6/index.ts Stage7-macro-expand.s6 > /tmp/_s7_macro_expand.ts && mv /tmp/_s7_macro_expand.ts Stage7-macro-expand.ts && npx tsx ../stage6/index.ts Stage7-scope-resolve.s6 > /tmp/_s7_scope_resolve.ts && mv /tmp/_s7_scope_resolve.ts Stage7-scope-resolve.ts && npx tsx ../stage6/index.ts Stage7.s6 > /tmp/_s7_main.ts && mv /tmp/_s7_main.ts ./index.ts
scripts.test: npm run build && npx vitest run
